description: Route compilation rules governing sigma hubs, overlay maps, and publish routing

sigma_descriptions.AppA: Appendix A - primary routing hub for atlas-internal traffic
sigma_descriptions.AppI: Appendix I - secondary hub for inter-station transfers
sigma_descriptions.AppM: Appendix M - tertiary hub for metro-level routing

hub_cap_description: Maximum number of active routes through any single hub at one time
publish_hub_description: Dedicated output hub for publish-class quests (S16 and above)
routing_rules: Routes must pass through at least one sigma hub before reaching destination
If primary hub is at capacity (hub_cap), route through fallback hub
Crown stations may use any sigma hub as primary
Publish-class outputs always terminate at AppO regardless of element overlay
Route compiler must reject cycles of length > 3
All routes must be logged in the route manifest with timestamp and hash
